ns0:entry.ns0:title: DependencyTrack/dependency-track
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DependencyTrack/dependency-track
Language: java
Dependency-Track is an intelligent Component Analysis platform that allows organizations to identify and reduce risk in the software supply chain.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/intellij-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-community
Language: java
IntelliJ IDEA & IntelliJ Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/interview-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/interview-guide
Language: java
基于 Spring Boot 4.0 + Java 21 + Spring AI + PostgreSQL + pgvector + RustFS + Redis，实现简历智能分析、AI模拟面试、知识库RAG检索等核心功能。非常适合作为学习和简历项目，学习门槛低。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SonarSource/sonarqube-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SonarSource/sonarqube-mcp-server
Language: java
SonarQube MCP Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YunaiV/yudao-cloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YunaiV/yudao-cloud
Language: java
ruoyi-vue-pro 全新 Cloud 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Cloud Alibaba + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 用户小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、多租户、数据权限、工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、MES、IM、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: antlr/antlr4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antlr/antlr4
Language: java
ANTLR (ANother Tool for Language Recognition) is a powerful parser generator for reading, processing, executing, or translating structured text or binary files.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/flink-cdc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/flink-cdc
Language: java
Flink CDC is a streaming data integration tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/gravitino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/gravitino
Language: java
World's most powerful open data catalog for building a high-performance, geo-distributed and federated metadata lake.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: checkstyle/checkstyle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/checkstyle/checkstyle
Language: java
Checkstyle is a development tool to help programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard. By default it supports the Google Java Style Guide and Sun Code Conventions, but is highly configurable. It can be invoked with an ANT task and a command line program.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dataease/dataease
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dataease/dataease
Language: java
🔥 人人可用的开源 BI 工具，数据可视化神器。An open-source BI tool alternative to Tableau.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: debezium/debezium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/debezium/debezium
Language: java
Change data capture for a variety of databases. Please log issues at https://github.com/debezium/dbz/issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI低代码平台，支持「低代码 + 零代码」双模式：零代码 5 分钟搭建业务系统，低代码模式一键生成前后端代码。 内置AI 应用，支持AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP与插件，支持各种模型。Skills能力实现：一句话画流程图、设计表单、生成系统。 引领 AI生成→在线配置→代码生成→手工合并的开发模式，解决Java项目80%的重复工作，快速提高效率，又不失灵活性。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra
Language: java
Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netty/netty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netty/netty
Language: java
Netty project - an event-driven asynchronous network application framework

Language: java
Quarkus: Supersonic Subatomic Java.

Language: java
Spring Boot helps you to create Spring-powered, production-grade applications and services with absolute minimum fuss.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
